data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will bring generally fine and very hot weather to the coast of Guangdong persistently in the next couple of days. A trough of low pressure is expected to edge closer to the coast of southern China towards the weekend, the weather will become unsettled with showers and thunderstorms over the region. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong during the weekend to early next week, temperatures will fall slightly over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260526","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4, force 5 offshore at first, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
